title: Irresistible Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A sweet and savory Malaysian dish featuring lemongrass and high protein chicken, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe is a classic representation of Malaysian street food.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, brown sugar, soy sauce, coriander, cumin, and salt.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with peanut oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken satay for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the chicken satay hot with chopped peanuts, bruised lemongrass, and your favorite dipping sauce.
Garnish with additional lemongrass and peanuts if desired.
Repeat with remaining chicken and ingredients.
